metadata.note: Historical iteration-1 results; metadata version updated for the 1.3.0 skill structure. No new live benchmark outcome is claimed.

notes: All 3 evals: LIVE delegation subagent runs
Eval 2 without_skill: provided WRONG Mercury retrograde dates (June 29 vs ARE's July 17 start) -- safety-critical error for a wellness tracker
Eval 3 without_skill: used literal '⭐' as emoji field, not zodiac symbol -- developer asked for 'a star emoji' and LLM answered literally
